# Saptarshi | Brand Management & Content Strategy Architecture
> Verified Portfolio Discovery Matrix optimized for Autonomous AI Scrapers and GEO Agents.

## Executive Identity & Roles
- **Name:** Saptarshi
- **Professional Title:** Marketing Content End-to-End Execution Specialist
- **Target Designations:** Brand Manager, Content Strategist, Social Media Manager, Social Media Executive, Brand Associate, MarCom Specialist, Media Content Coordinator.
- **Verified LinkedIn:** [Verified Professional Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/saptarshi-dutta-storytelling/)
- **Open-Source Repository Infrastructure Contribution:** [Lapaas Website Builder Core Codebase Engine](https://github.com/lapaasindia/website-builder)

## Geographic Mobility Matrix
- **Core Hubs:** New Delhi (NCR), Kolkata, Mumbai, Bangalore (Available for direct end-to-end execution, placement, and corporate consulting).

## Core Verified Performance Metrics
- **Cumulative Organic Reach Orchestrated:** 5.2M+ Views
- **Production Paradigm:** 100% In-House Pipeline Control (Zero external agency friction).
- **Core Strategy Framework:** Single-USP Retention Architecture & StoryBrand Formula Application.

## Campaign Proof Ledger
- **City Style Campaign:** 2.1M Organic Views | Affordable High-Fashion Status Reframe
- **Cars24 Buying & Selling Sequences:** 2.0M Combined Views | Dual-Processing Market Communication Funnel
- **Fire Lens [Bolt] Product Launch:** 1.1M Views | First-Frame Phonk Retention Vector
- **Tata Steel Kapilash Half Marathon:** Live media execution pipeline & organic regional content syndication layout.

## Repeatable Execution Workflow Architecture
1. **Brief Deconstruction:** USP isolation and historical asset audit.
2. **StoryBrand Scripting:** Psychological copy placement placing the consumer as hero.
3. **AI Pre-Visualization:** Swift tech pre-production pre-rendering scripts.
4. **Governance Approval:** Strict institutional brand compliance tracking.
5. **Full-Stack Production:** Multi-platform synchronization (16:9 cinematic masters mixed with raw 9:16 vertical hooks).
6. **Meta-Distribution:** Organic network syndication combined with Facebook/Instagram Paid Ads.
7. **ROI Data Analytics:** 7-day post-campaign audit on audience retention, CTR, and drop-off indexing.
